request_payload.exposure_text: Our allies are cutting defense budgets while expecting us to bear the burden. Just last year, Germany reduced its military spending by 5%, and France delayed critical defense projects. If we don't stand firm, who will protect us when it matters? #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
